paragraph_or_text_span: This guideline was published in the January 2017 issue of Otolaryngology–Head and Neck Surgery on January 3. Published Guideline Executive Summary Plain Language Summary

The primary purpose of this guideline is to help clinicians identify patients with cerumen impaction who may benefit from intervention, and to promote evidence-based management. Another purpose of the guideline is to highlight needs and management options in special populations or in patients who have modifying factors.
